isolation.scope: local-only surface; no app code changes

assertions.title: Multi-day sparklines with shared day axis and baseline bands

steps.expected: Readiness, HRV, RHR, Body Temp Deviation sparklines share a day axis with baseline bands and show post-event dip then convergence
steps.observed: Shared axis and event markers are present, but rendered metric set is Readiness/HRV/RHR/Sleep Score (Body Temp Deviation missing), and the expected post-event convergence pattern is not clearly present.

assertions.issues: Contract-required Body Temp Deviation panel was not rendered.

assertions.title: S3 scenario — post-workout recovery arc visible at a glance

steps.action: Validate S3 scenario in Recovery view for Mar 24-28
steps.expected: Workout marker '10K run', Readiness 42→82 by Thu 27, HRV 26→48, red→yellow→green progression, and InsightCard mentions '3 days' recovery
steps.observed: Workout marker exists but not '10K run'; table values differ (Readiness 91,98,95,84,67 and HRV 23.3,49.9,70.1,79.6,76.4), and no InsightCard text indicating '3 days' recovery was observed.

assertions.issues: S3 fixture expectations are not met on the current local surface.

assertions.title: Correlation card with coefficients and share action

steps.action: Open Trend view and inspect for correlation content and Share action
steps.expected: CorrelationCard displays coefficient/strength/direction labels and a clickable 'Share ↗' button
steps.observed: No correlation card content was rendered; DOM check returned hasCorrelation=false and only sidebar 'Shared Links' text matched share.

evidence.network: Trend requests captured, but no correlation UI surfaced (frontend-views/rerun-recovery-trend/trend-network-requests.txt, frontend-views/rerun-recovery-trend/trend-correlation-dom-check.json)

assertions.issues: Correlation card and in-card Share action were absent in the tested Trend UI.

assertions.title: Resolution toggle and range presets work

steps.observed: Default state loaded with 30D selected and Weekly smoothing selected (7-day averaged behavior).

steps.action: Toggle Daily and Monthly resolution options
steps.observed: Selecting Daily triggered smoothing=none requests; selecting Monthly triggered smoothing=30d requests and changed displayed trend values.

steps.expected: Time range and data window update accordingly
steps.observed: Preset selection updated to 90D and 7D, with corresponding trend API windows and chart values changing.

evidence.network: GET /api/views/trend requests observed with smoothing=7d/none/30d and windows for 30D, 90D, 7D (frontend-views/rerun-recovery-trend/trend-network-requests.txt); direct API check returned 200 (frontend-views/rerun-recovery-trend/network-trend-response.txt)

frictions.description: Assigned browser session initially landed on /sign-in when opening /dashboard.
frictions.resolution: Generated local mock-auth __session token for user_test_001 and set cookie in session f2004cfaceb5__u3.

frictions.description: agent-browser request log does not include HTTP status codes.
frictions.resolution: Captured supporting request/response artifacts with curl for recovery and trend endpoints.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-UITRD-003) and 3 failed (VAL-UIRCV-001, VAL-UIRCV-003, VAL-UITRD-002).
